Note: Training-sample mean as a constant forecast (no trend/seasonality).
Average of the last 3 months — reacts fast, chases noise.
Average of the last 12 months — smooths a full seasonal cycle away.
Weighted average of last 3 months, newest month weighted most.
Linearly-weighted average over the last 12 months.
Single exponential smoothing — optimised level only, no trend.
Holt linear trend with damping — level + decaying trend.
OLS with trend, monthly dummies, COVID dummy and AR lags (stepwise AIC).
Holt-Winters multiplicative, no trend — level + seasonal factors.
Equal-weight average of Holt-Winters and ARIMA (Bates & Granger 1969).
